variant: All TR models (TR-33, TR-35, TR-50, TR-75, TR-50-H, TR-75-H, TR-50-W, TR-35-1, TR-33-1)

dimensions.wider_tracks_note: 32 inch for wider models, 48 inch standard between tracks

installation_requirements.power_note: Power to lift and 60 PSI pneumatic air (for lift locks) to be brought into top back of lift control console
installation_requirements.separate_120vac: A separate 120 VAC power supply is required to be brought to Post #1 (Post #2 only) for track lights and airline outlet
installation_requirements.air_supply: 60 PSI to be brought to Post #2 (Post #2 only) for track lights and airline option
installation_requirements.electrical_connection: Final electrical connection to local/national code is responsibility of electrical contractor; more than one point of connection may be required
installation_requirements.electrical_not_provided: Disconnect switches, main fuses, and main power leads are NOT provided by Mohawk
installation_requirements.pneumatic_power: Responsibility of mechanical contractor to final designated point at vehicle lift

features: TR-Series four-post track lift family covering 33,000 to 75,000 lb capacities
Multiple model variants including standard, heavy-duty (-H), wide (-W), and single-phase (-1)
4 console-lift orientation options (A, B, C, D); Mohawk recommends orientation A
Stationary or portable console with optional caster kit

optional_equipment.item: Lights & 110 VAC Outlets in Tracks (See Note 2)

optional_equipment.note: See Note 3; add to drivers side to pass spec

certifications: ALI/ETL certification referenced for jacking beams
Some options may invalidate ALI/ETL certification - consult Mohawk representative
notes: Power to lift and 60 PSI pneumatic air (for lift locks) to be brought into top back of lift control console
A separate 120 VAC power supply required to Post #1 for track lights and airline outlet
Air supply of 60 PSI to Post #2 for track and airline options
Some option combinations are NOT available
Some options may invalidate ALI/ETL certification of lift - consult a Mohawk representative
Vehicle data forms must be provided for vehicles intended for this lift
Fill out data forms for largest, smallest, and lowest underclearance vehicles
Power unit location per customer's spec; Mohawk recommends orientation A
